nodes.name: 加纳

nodes.name: Red-cheeked wattle-eye
nodes.summary: The red-cheeked wattle-eye (Platysteira blissetti) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is found in Cameroon, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, Nigeria, Sierra Leone, and Togo. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The red-cheeked wattle-eye (Platysteira blissetti) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is found in Cameroon, Ivory Coast,…
